mermaidSyntax:
flowchart TD A[Patient presents with suspected infection] --> B{SIRS criteria met?
Temp >38C or <36C, HR>90,
RR>20, WBC>12K or <4K
Need 2 of 4} B -->|No| C[Monitor and reassess in 4 hours] C --> A B -->|Yes| D{qSOFA >= 2?
Altered mentation,
SBP<=100, RR>=22} D -->|No| E[Low risk - Floor admission
with monitoring] D -->|Yes| F{Lactate level?} F -->|< 2 mmol/L| G[Sepsis
Start antibiotics within 1 hour] F -->|2-4 mmol/L| H[Severe sepsis
IV fluids 30mL/kg +
antibiotics + ICU consult] F -->|> 4 mmol/L| I[Septic shock
Immediate ICU transfer +
vasopressors + central line] G --> J[Reassess at 6 hours] H --> J I --> J
